rows.notes: Visual verification of transcription; both extractors had minor inaccuracies in description ('pro' vs 'for', '2^do' vs '2d', 'Nov^r' vs 'Novr'). Confirmed header type.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description text based on visual verification. Confirmed header type. claude-haiku had 'Money Rents paid.'.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts. claude-haiku had 'Gwmear' and '90' pounds, which was incorrect.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts. claude-haiku had 'Minheniot. 1. ½ year' and '20' pounds, which was incorrect. Added '. . .' to description to accurately reflect dots in the image.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description ('Donnithorne' vs 'Dornthorne') and pounds amount ('6' vs '8'). Shillings and pence were agreed.
Full consensus between extractors for all fields.
Selected gemini-flash description. Pounds and shillings were agreed. Visual verification confirms pence is 0 (matching claude-haiku), not 8 (gemini-flash). claude-haiku had 'Widnham. 2 yrs'.
